metadata.name: moopy
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Stormmoor.

towns.name: Stormmoor
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

key_dungeons.name: Crumbling Mines
key_dungeons.description: The air around Crumbling Mines shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Crumbling Mines for the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
